title: Statistics and Open Data - Canada.ca
content:
## Statistics and open data : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada’s statistical publications provide information on permanent and temporary residents as well as on immigration and citizenship programs.

## Services and information

### IRCC’s Data Strategy
Read the directions for the strategic management and increased impact of data in our department

### IRCC datasets on the Open Data Portal
Search the portal to find statistical information from immigration and citizenship programs

### Key numbers on Canadian immigration
Monthly data on students and temporary workers as well as asylum claimants

### Library and Archives Canada
Explore older statistics reports through Library and Archives Canada

### Government of Canada Publications
Explore older statistical reports and publications from the Government of Canada

### Citizenship and Immigration statistics archives (1966 to 1996)
Read former annual statistical publications describing Canada’s immigration and citizenship programs

### Data on the settlement and resettlement programs
Get data and information about the settlement and resettlement programs and the Newcomer Outcomes Survey.

### Requests for other IRCC statistics
To submit a request for data, please email the RD statistics mailbox with a detailed description of your requested report. Please note that ad hoc requests for data may require a cost recovery fee to be paid as per the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations .
